fields.player_id: Canonical player identifier used by the serving layer.
fields.team_id: WhoScored team identifier for the player in the match or serving snapshot.
fields.side: Whether the player represented the home or away team.
fields.player_name: Player display name carried from the source record.
fields.display_name: Canonical player name shown by the API and dashboard.
fields.position: Detailed WhoScored position code recorded for the appearance.
fields.position_group: Broad position group used by the current rating or valuation model.
fields.position_group_source: Method used to derive the broad position group.
fields.shirt_number: Squad number recorded for the appearance.
fields.started: Whether the player was in the starting lineup.
fields.starts: Number of starts in the valuation interval.
fields.start_share: Share of interval appearances that were starts.
fields.is_man_of_match: Whether WhoScored marked the player as man of the match.
fields.player_json: Serialized source player payload retained for traceability.
fields.minutes: Minutes played in the row's match, season, or valuation interval.
fields.minutes_source: Source or calculation method used for minutes played.
fields.season: Competition season label in YYYY-YYYY format.
fields.match_datetime: Scheduled or observed match kickoff timestamp.
fields.shots: Total shot attempts credited to the player.
fields.xg: Expected goals generated by the player's shots.
fields.xgot: Expected goals on target generated by on-target shots.
fields.passes: Pass attempts credited to the player.
fields.progressive_passes: Passes meeting the project progression threshold.
fields.assists: Goals directly assisted by the player.
fields.xa: Expected assists generated by the player's passes.
fields.carries: Ball carries credited to the player.
fields.progressive_carries: Carries meeting the project progression threshold.
fields.final_third_carries: Carries ending in the attacking final third.
fields.xt_added: Expected-threat value added by player actions.
fields.xpv_added: Expected possession-value contribution added by player actions.
fields.opponent_threat_prevented: Estimated opponent threat removed by defensive actions.
fields.defensive_net_threat_reduction: Net opponent threat reduction after accounting for defensive actions and concessions.
fields.big_chances_missed: Big chances that did not result in a goal.
fields.big_chance_xg_missed: Expected-goal value of missed big chances.
fields.own_goals: Own goals scored by the player.
fields.shots_on_target_faced: On-target shots faced by a goalkeeper.
fields.goals_conceded_xgot_sample: Goals conceded for the subset of shots with xGOT coverage.
fields.xgot_faced: Expected goals on target faced by a goalkeeper.
fields.goals_conceded: Goals conceded while the goalkeeper was involved.
fields.pass_completion_prior: Role-level prior mean used to stabilize pass completion.
fields.pass_prior_strength: Equivalent attempt count assigned to the pass-completion prior.
fields.pass_completion_above_expected: Difference between smoothed and expected pass completion.
fields.saves: On-target shots faced minus goals conceded.
fields.goals_prevented: Expected goals on target faced minus goals conceded.
fields.threat_component: Standardized shot-threat contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.creation_component: Standardized chance-creation contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.progression_component: Standardized ball-progression contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.retention_component: Standardized possession-retention contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.attacking_xpv_component: Standardized attacking xPV contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.defensive_component: Standardized defensive contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.finishing_component: Standardized finishing contribution used by the post-match rating.
fields.goalkeeper_component: Standardized shot-stopping contribution used for goalkeepers.
fields.raw_position_composite: Weighted component composite before reliability adjustment.
fields.appearance_reliability: Minutes-based reliability weight applied to the appearance.
fields.reliability_adjusted_composite: Position composite after shrinkage toward the role baseline.
fields.standardized_composite: Role-standardized composite used to map performance onto the rating scale.
fields.clean_sheet_bonus: Bounded goalkeeper bonus for a clean sheet.
fields.base_rating: Rating before decisive-action bonuses and disciplinary penalties.
fields.assist_overperformance: Assists above expected assists used by the decisive-action adjustment.
fields.decisive_action_bonus: Bounded bonus for goals, assists, and other decisive actions.
fields.card_penalty: Rating deduction for yellow and red cards.
fields.big_chance_miss_penalty: Rating deduction for missed big chances.
fields.post_match_rating: Final position-adjusted player rating on a 1–10 scale.
fields.rating: Published post-match rating exposed by the serving layer.
fields.rating_version: Immutable version identifier for the post-match rating formula.
fields.rolling_3_match_rating: Mean rating over the latest three eligible appearances.
fields.rolling_20_match_rating: Mean rating over the latest 20 eligible appearances.
fields.performance_impact_score: Difference between the match rating and the neutral 6.0 baseline.
fields.impact_direction: Categorical positive, neutral, or negative interpretation of match impact.
fields.explanation: Human-readable summary of the strongest rating components.
fields.opponent: Opponent display name when available from the serving build.
fields.estimated_value_delta_eur: Change in the replayed valuation estimate after the match.
fields.replay_run_id: Identifier for the chronological valuation replay run.
fields.replay_sequence: Order of the match inside a chronological replay.
fields.valuation_update_status: Status of valuation scoring for the replayed match.
fields.valuation_estimate_eur: Replayed point estimate after incorporating the match.
fields.valuation_lower_90_eur: Lower bound of the replayed 90% predictive interval.
fields.valuation_upper_90_eur: Upper bound of the replayed 90% predictive interval.
fields.interval_id: Stable identifier for the modeled valuation interval.
fields.previous_valuation_date: Date of the observed valuation that starts the interval.
fields.previous_market_value_eur: Observed market value at the start of the interval.
fields.two_updates_back_value_eur: Observed value two Transfermarkt updates before the interval target.
fields.age_at_valuation: Player age in years at the start of the valuation interval.
fields.club_name: Club associated with the valuation observation.
fields.valuation_date: Date of the observed target or current valuation.
fields.interval_days: Number of days between observed valuation updates.
fields.log_previous_market_value: Natural logarithm of the previous observed market value.
fields.previous_log_value_change: Log change in value during the preceding valuation interval.
fields.market_value_eur: Observed market value at the end of a labeled interval.
fields.target_log_value_change: Observed log market-value change used as the regression target.
fields.appearances: Distinct player appearances represented by the row.
fields.average_rating: Mean post-match rating during the valuation interval.
fields.recency_weighted_rating: Interval rating weighted toward more recent appearances.
fields.rating_last_90_days: Mean eligible rating during the 90 days before the valuation cutoff.
fields.rating_volatility: Standard deviation of post-match ratings during the interval.
fields.rolling_3_matches_available: Number of eligible matches available for the three-match window.
fields.rolling_20_matches_available: Number of eligible matches available for the 20-match window.
fields.log_minutes: Natural logarithm of interval minutes plus one.
fields.log_appearances: Natural logarithm of interval appearances plus one.
fields.age_squared: Squared age term used to model nonlinear age effects.
fields.valuation_year: Calendar year of the valuation cutoff.
fields.valuation_month_sin: Sine encoding of valuation month seasonality.
fields.valuation_month_cos: Cosine encoding of valuation month seasonality.
fields.recent_rating_trend: Difference between short-window and long-window rating form.
fields.goals_over_xg_per90: Goals above expected goals normalized per 90 minutes.
fields.assists_over_xa_per90: Assists above expected assists normalized per 90 minutes.
fields.valuation_model_version: Version identifier for the active valuation model.
fields.predicted_log_value_change: Posterior mean predicted log market-value change.
fields.predicted_pct_value_change: Predicted proportional change from the observed baseline value.
fields.probability_value_increase: Posterior probability that market value increased.
fields.predictive_log_change_lower_90: Lower bound of the 90% predictive interval on log change.
fields.predictive_log_change_upper_90: Upper bound of the 90% predictive interval on log change.
fields.predicted_market_value_eur: Model point estimate of current market value.
fields.predicted_market_value_lower_90_eur: Lower bound of the 90% market-value predictive interval.
fields.predicted_market_value_upper_90_eur: Upper bound of the 90% market-value predictive interval.
fields.mapping_method: Entity-resolution method used to connect source identifiers.
fields.mapping_confidence: Confidence assigned to the accepted cross-source mapping.
fields.current_form_rating: Latest exponentially weighted form rating exposed by the API.
fields.latest_valuation_date: Date of the most recent published Transfermarkt valuation.
fields.current_market_value_eur: Most recent observed Transfermarkt market value.
fields.estimated_value_eur: Current model point estimate exposed by the API.
fields.estimated_lower_eur: Lower bound of the current 90% predictive interval.
fields.estimated_upper_eur: Upper bound of the current 90% predictive interval.
fields.direction: Categorical interpretation of the predicted value movement.
fields.confidence: Normalized forecast-confidence indicator exposed to the UI.
fields.refreshed_at: Timestamp when the serving snapshot was generated.
fields.source: Source system that published the valuation observation.
fields.primary_role: Detailed role with the most eligible minutes in the season.
fields.secondary_role: Detailed role with the second-most eligible minutes, when present.
fields.primary_role_share: Share of eligible minutes played in the primary detailed role.
fields.is_hybrid_role: Whether the primary role accounts for less than 60% of eligible role minutes.
fields.sample_status: Whether the player meets the profile and benchmark sample thresholds.
fields.phase: High-level phase grouping used to organize profile metrics.
fields.metric_label: Human-readable label displayed in the profile chart.
fields.metric_value: Underlying season metric value shown inside the profile wedge.
fields.percentile: Same-role EPL percentile after winsorization and direction handling.
fields.higher_is_better: Whether larger raw values represent stronger performance.
fields.display_order: Stable order used to arrange metrics around the profile chart.
fields.benchmark_minutes: Minimum season minutes required for inclusion in the percentile benchmark.
fields.similar_player_id: Canonical identifier of the compared player.
fields.similar_player_name: Display name of the compared player.
fields.metrics_used: Number of non-null standardized metrics used in the distance calculation.
fields.similarity: Exponential similarity score derived from weighted standardized distance.
fields.profile_similarity: Serving alias for the player-profile similarity score.
fields.rank: Similarity rank within the selected player's candidate set.
